productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Faas Graphic T-shirt
description: Style NoteStructured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, has a round neck, green piping at the neckline, short sleeves, print on the front, branding printed on the left sleeve, yellow paneling at the under arm region and print at the back yokeMaterial and Care66% cotton, 29% polyester and 5% elastaneMachine wash inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18")  is wearing a size M
